query:
INSERT INTO users (name, email, role, passwordHash, active, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Administrador', 'admin@praiotel.pt', 'admin', '$2b$10$YQiiz.PH9V8nV3.5vF5bYeKxKHjK0RLGwY3pXFZ5mKxPZQH5mKxPZ', true, NOW(), NOW())
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
SET passwordHash = '$2b$10$YQiiz.PH9V8nV3.5vF5bYeKxKHjK0RLGwY3pXFZ5mKxPZQH5mKxPZ', active = true, updatedAt = NOW()
RETURNING id, name, email, role;
